prompt: I have a CSV of our Q1-Q4 sales data. Can you generate a report showing how each region performed and the overall trend? The file is at sales_data.csv.

assertions.name: has-key-findings-with-numbers
assertions.description: Report contains a 'Key Findings' section with specific numbers (not generic statements)

assertions.name: region-bar-chart-exists
assertions.description: A bar chart PNG showing revenue by region exists and has axis labels and a title

assertions.name: trend-line-chart-exists
assertions.description: A line chart PNG showing the quarterly trend exists and has axis labels and a title

assertions.name: summary-stats-table
assertions.description: The report includes a summary table with total revenue, record count, and averages

assertions.name: pivot-table-region-quarter
assertions.description: A pivot table showing region × quarter breakdown with totals is present

assertions.name: summary-csv-saved
assertions.description: A summary.csv file is saved with the aggregated data

assertions.name: numbers-formatted
assertions.description: Numbers in the report are formatted with commas and/or dollar signs for readability

assertions.name: notes-section-exists
assertions.description: The report includes a Notes section mentioning any data quality observations
